sections.paragraph: <entryFree id="n19383" key="baroulko/s" type="main" opt="n" TEIform="entryFree"> <orth extent="full" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="orth">βᾰρουλκός</orth> (sc. <foreign lang="greek" TEIform="foreign">μηχανή</foreign>), <gen lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="gen">ἡ</gen>, <sense id="n19383.0" n="A" level="1" opt="n" TEIform="sense"> <tr_ opt="n" TEIform="tr">lifting-screw,</tr_> invented by Archimedes, <bibl n="urn:cts:greekLit:tlg2032.tlg001:1060" default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <author TEIform="author">Papp.</author> <biblScope TEIform="biblScope">1060</biblScope></bibl>, al., prob. in <bibl default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <author TEIform="author">Vitr.</author> <biblScope TEIform="biblScope">10.1.1</biblScope></bibl>.</sense> </entryFree>
